user_query: I need to generate a dashboard summary for my company's revenue for the past month.

TaskList.description: Fetch revenue data for the current year for the date range from 01-09-2021 to 30-09-2021.
Fetch revenue data for the previous year for the same date range.
Generate comparative analysis of the revenue data from the current year and last year.
Create a dashboard summary using the comparative analysis and revenue data.
